channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: With home prices and mortgage rates high, many families find the American dream out of reach
item.description: With home prices high, American families are grappling with the prospect that homeownership might remain out of reach for them for a long time.
item.dc:creator: R.J. Rico, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Author's story of coping after a wildfire resonates with community affected by latest LA-area fires
item.description: PASADENA, Calif. (AP) — On a quiet summer evening in June 1990, Pico Iyer sat in his family home in Santa Barbara, California, when suddenly, he was surrounded by walls of flames five stories high.
item.dc:creator: DEEPA BHARATH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Think you can bellow like a stag? German hunters compete in a national deer calling championship
item.description: DORTMUND, Germany (AP) — German hunters tried to convince the jury at a national stag calling championship that they can imitate a bellowing red deer most realistically.
item.dc:creator: DANIEL NIEMANN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tie-dye and dancing bears: Grammy weekend begins with Grateful Dead honored as Persons of the Year
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Colorful dancing bears during cocktails. Tie-dye clothing mixed with black-tie. Oh yeah, the Grateful Dead was in the house to kick off Grammy weekend.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bodycam footage shows moment Florida officers' attempt to restrain suspect goes horribly wrong
item.description: A Miami Beach Police officer will not face criminal charges after accidentally shooting a fellow cop while responding to a call on a busy Florida roadway.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ICE agents raid seafood store, detain U.S. military veteran
item.description: "I asked them [the agents] what documentation they were looking for, and they said it was a license or a passport.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, KTLA 5

item.title: A medical plane carrying a child patient and 5 others crashes in Philadelphia, setting homes ablaze
item.description: A medical transport jet carrying a child patient, her mother and four others has crashed into a Philadelphia neighborhood about 30 seconds after taking off, erupting in a fireball and engulfing several homes in flames.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: A medical plane carrying a child patient and 5 others crashes in Philadelphia, setting homes ablaze
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A medical transport jet transporting a child who had just completed treatment for a life-threatening condition, her mother and four others crashed into a Philadelphia neighborhood shortly after takeoff Friday evening, exploding in a fireball that engulfed several homes.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and MATT ROURKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Beneath the surface, Groundhog Day's deep roots predate Punxsutawney Phil
item.description: Groundhog Day predictions about the coming of spring put the spotlight on Punxsutawney Phil every Feb. 2.
item.dc:creator: Mark Scolforo, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Colleges around the US cautiously navigate Trump's DEI crackdown
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — In Boston, Northeastern University renamed a program for underrepresented students, emphasizing “belonging” for all. In New Jersey, a session at Rutgers University catering to students from historically Black colleges had to be abruptly canceled. And around the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Delphi murders: Convicted killer in hiking trail slayings cites new evidence in bid to overturn conviction
item.description: Delphi murders suspect Richard Allen, found guilty of brutally murdering two teen girls on an Indiana hiking trail in 2017, is asking a Carroll County court to overturn his conviction.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Air traffic controller left early from work before crash: report
item.description: An air traffic controller at Reagan National Airport reportedly left early on Wednesday before the deadly collision between an American Airlines flight and a military helicopter.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US colleges returning to campus sexual assault rules created during Trump's first term
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Schools and universities responding to complaints of sexual misconduct must return to policies created during President Donald Trump's first term, with requirements for live hearings and more protections for accused students, according to new guidance issued Friday by the Education
item.dc:creator: COLLIN BINKLEY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Recovery efforts and investigation continue into D.C. plane crash
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration is now restricting helicopter flights near Reagan National Airport.
item.dc:creator: Reshad Hudson, KTLA 5

item.title: Atlanta rethinks clearing homeless camps after a man is crushed inside his tent
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Atlanta leaders are reconsidering how they dismantle homeless camps after a man was crushed inside a tent as a bulldozer destroyed makeshift homes in preparation for Martin Luther King Jr. holiday events.
item.dc:creator: JEFF MARTIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Late-night CBP helicopter ride-along shows advanced tech used to apprehend migrants
item.description: Fox News took an exclusive nighttime helicopter ride over the border in El Paso, Texas, with U.S. Customs and Border Protection to view the day-to-day work that goes into protecting the border.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Thousands of Costco workers prepare to strike with midnight contract deadline looming
item.description: Thousands of Costco workers prepared to strike with a midnight deadline drawing closer Friday while the worker's union and the company negotiated. The Teamsters union represents 18,000 Costco workers in six states: California, Washington, Maryland, Virginia, New Jersey and New York.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Rats! More rodents are infesting cities as scientists say warmer temperatures mean more rat babies
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Rat infestation in many world cities appears to be soaring, especially in Washington, and a new study blames warming temperatures, urbanization and other human actions.
item.dc:creator: SETH BORENSTEIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Illinois governor blocks pardoned Jan. 6 rioters from state jobs
item.description: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker (D) said he would block pardoned Capitol insurrectionists from serving in local government positions, citing a state law ordinance, according to a Thursday letter obtained by The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: California man pleads guilty after his drone collides with aircraft fighting Palisades Fire
item.description: A California man agrees to plead guilty to one count of unsafe operation of an unmanned aircraft after his drone collides with firefighting Super Scooper aircraft battling the Palisades Fire.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Robert Santos decides to resign as US Census Bureau director midway through a 5-year term
item.description: Robert Santos, who emphasized inclusivity and outreach to overlooked communities, has decided to resign as director of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SCHNEIDER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: North Carolina's ex-lieutenant governor dismisses lawsuit against CNN, has no plans to run again
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — North Carolina's former Lt. Gov. Mark Robinson on Friday withdrew his defamation lawsuit against CNN that challenged a report about him making explicit posts on a pornography website’s message board over a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: GARY D. ROBERTSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Dell CEO says company is 'retiring' remote work, calling workers back 5 days a week: report
item.description: (KRON) -- Dell has reportedly joined the growing list of companies putting an end to remote work policies and demanding that workers be in the office five days a week.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Mother, daughter identified as victims in DC plane-helicopter collision
item.description: More details about the 67 people who died in the helicopter and plane crash outside of Washington D.C. are being shared. Several victims were Virginia residents from Loudon and Fairfax counties, ranging from parents to children.
item.dc:creator: Allison Williams, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Parents charged with neglect after 8-year-old girl dies from fentanyl poisoning
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS -- Two Indianapolis parents have been arrested and charged with neglect resulting in her death after their 8-year-old child died from acute fentanyl poisoning.
item.dc:creator: David Gay, NewsNation

item.title: Detectives believe missing woman's brother killed, dismembered her
item.description: A woman who went missing a year ago was declared dead by a Manatee County Probate judge, the Bradenton Police Department announced.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, NewsNation

item.title: 40+ bodies pulled from Potomac near Reagan National
item.description: More than 40 bodies have been recovered from the Potomac River after a deadly mid-air collision sent an Army Black Hawk helicopter and American Airlines plane diving into the icy water earlier this week, according to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Flight recorders recovered in DCA crash
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) said Thursday that they recovered flight data recorders, known as black boxes, from the aircraft involved in the deadly mid-air collision near Reagan Washington National Airport earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, Fox 5

item.title: Student, attorney among Ohioans killed in D.C. plane crash
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) -- A 20-year-old student at an Ohio university was among those killed Wednesday night when an American Airlines passenger jet collided with an Army helicopter in Washington D.C. Grace Maxwell was a junior at Cedarville University.
item.dc:creator: Brian Hofmann, NewsNation

item.title: Engineering student among DC plane crash victims
item.description: DAYTON, Ohio (WDTN) -- Cedarville University is grieving one of its own after the devastating plane crash in Washington D.C. Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Emily Lewis, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Who is Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy? You may recognize him from MTV
item.description: Duffy, formerly a reality TV star and Wisconsin congressman, was confirmed as the new transportation secretary on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Jill Colvin, WGN 9

item.title: Donald Trump talks so much that even his White House stenographers are struggling to keep up
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The White House stenographers have a problem. Donald Trump is talking so much, the people responsible for transcribing his public remarks are struggling to keep up with all the words.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Are we all aliens? NASA's returned asteroid samples hold the ingredients of life from a watery world
item.description: Asteroid samples fetched by NASA hold not only the pristine building blocks for life but also the salty remains of an ancient water world..
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Figure skaters among those on flight that collided with Army helicopter
item.description: U.S. Figure Skating released a statement saying athletes, coaches, and family members were on their way home from the National Development Camp held in conjunction with the U.S. Figure Skating Championship in Kansas when the collision happened.
item.dc:creator: Brian Farrell, Fox 5

item.title: No survivors after collision between American Airlines jet, Army helicopter near DC
item.description: Everyone aboard an American Airlines jet carrying 60 passengers and four crew members that collided with an Army helicopter was feared dead in what was likely to be the worst U.S. aviation disaster in almost a quarter century, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Anna Chen, ABC 4

item.title: No survivors after collision between American Airlines jet, Army helicopter near DC
item.description: Everyone aboard an American Airlines jet carrying 60 passengers and four crew members that collided with an Army helicopter was feared dead in what was likely to be the worst U.S. aviation disaster in almost a quarter century, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Anna Chen, WGN 9

item.title: First US case of H5N9 bird flu strain found in California
item.description: The first confirmed case of H5N9 bird flu in the United States has been identified in Merced County, California, and control measures are being undertaken to contain the virus.
item.dc:creator: Dom McAndrew, ABC 4
